roleLine: Computer Science student focused on building clean, useful software.

paragraphs: I'm currently an undergraduate student at the University of Houston pursuing a B.S. in Computer Science. Recently, I built a full-stack app used by 100+ students that helps UH students understand their degree progress and get schedule recommendations.

I'm interested in machine learning, operating systems, and full-stack development, and I care a lot about clean UI and maintainable architecture. Outside of tech, I’m really into desk setups and PCs, and I spend my free time playing chess, thrifting, and gaming.
